X.name: TUI 运行状态增强
X.description: ClearHistory 后端同步, Error/SecurityBlocked/EmergencyStopped 对话区显示, 活动指示器 3 行 + rounds/tools 计数, 完成摘要, CC 风格 git 状态

key_decisions: Activity indicator: removed top/bottom borders, single content row (height 3→1)
Status bar: added empty bottom row for visual spacing (height 3→4)
Completion summaries preserved across rounds — extracted before final_messages replace, re-inserted before last user message
OctoRoot legacy db fallbacks removed — unified to ~/.octo/projects/<key>/octo.db, OCTO_DB_PATH kept for testing
Ctrl+O scroll: deferred to render phase via scroll_to_tool, uses ConversationWidget::scroll_offset_for_tool() for precise positioning

deferred.description: octo root migrate — auto-migrate legacy DB locations to new OctoRoot layout
deferred.precondition: When users need automated migration from legacy paths
When multi-project config management is needed

deferred.description: Dependency graph topo-sort wiring — no builtin skills use dependencies currently
deferred.precondition: When skills with inter-dependencies are added

notes: Post-Phase X polish complete. 5 commits after Phase X: (1) activity indicator borders removed (1 row), (2) status bar bottom padding added, (3) completion summaries preserved across rounds, (4) OctoRoot legacy fallbacks removed — unified db path, (5) Ctrl+O precise scroll positioning via scroll_offset_for_tool(). Tests: 2387 workspace (unchanged).
